name: Yutaka Foods Corporation
summary: Yutaka Foods Corporation manufactures and sells food products in Japan. It offers liquid seasoning foods, such as soy sauces, as well as eel sauce, white dashi, and soups; and powdered and granular foods. The company also provides chilled foods, instant noodles, etc. under the Maru-chan brand name. In addition, it is involved in the contract manufacturing of granular food products. The company was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Chita, Japan.
